title: Mr. 1 Finally Bleeds
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on mr. 1 finally bleeds, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Mr. 1 Finally Bleeds. Zoro pushes past his limits against Mr. 1 and discovers the state of mind needed to cut steel. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The hotair will take in the moisture and rise

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And then collide with the descending cold air and cause a sudden drop in temperature, causing the moisture to freeze! (Once that happens...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Didn't I tell you not to look away?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: You're quite skilled at running away, if nothing else.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I think my leg went out from the falling rubble...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Ah, that's right! Did my bubble work...?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: I should be asking you that.

summary: This part develops mr. 1 finally bleeds and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
